## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No new telemetry, analytics, tracking, or remote scripts
- [ ] No new Chrome permissions without maintainer discussion
- [ ] No wallet API, signing flow, private key, or seed phrase access
- [ ] No proactive clipboard reads
- [ ] Preserves strict CSP and MV3 constraints
- [ ] Scope is focused and reviewable
